definitions: 全年（都）；常年（一整年持续地）

examples.text: ideal for shipping. By the end of the 1800s, bananas were a hit in the US. They were affordable, available year-round, and endorsed by medical doctors. As bananas became big business,
examples.explanation: 这里的 year-round 表示“全年都能买到 / 常年供应”。句子意思是：到 19 世纪末，香蕉在美国很受欢迎，因为价格实惠、全年都能买到，而且还得到医生的推崇。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
